# MeowAcademy - บริการรับจ้างเก็บชั่วโมงจิตอาสา กยศ.

## About Us
MeowAcademy is a specialized service designed to help Thai students manage their student loan (กยศ.) volunteer hour requirements. We offer a fast, reliable, and secure service to collect and log volunteer hours into the official systems, allowing students to focus on their studies.

## Key Services & Pricing
- **Hourly Rate:** 5 THB per hour.
- **Package Deal:** 36 hours for 150 THB (Save 17%).
- **Data Entry Service:** 50 THB to manually enter the logged hours into the official กยศ. system.

## Important Information
- **Safety:** We prioritize user privacy and ensure that all information is handled securely. We do not use bots; everything is managed by our dedicated team.
- **Disclaimer:** MeowAcademy is an independent service provider and is not affiliated with the official Student Loan Fund (กยศ.). We only provide assistance in recording and fulfilling volunteer hour requirements.

## Contact & Links
- Website: https://meow-loan.com
- Contact / Line Official: https://line.me/R/ti/p/@807chkoh

## FAQ
Q: Is it safe?
A: 100% safe. Personal information is kept confidential.
Q: How long does it take?
A: Usually 1-2 days after payment confirmation.
Q: Do you offer loans?
A: No, we only provide volunteer hour recording services, not financial loans.
